message:
feat: revert to simple scrollable sections configuration interface

After reverting complex tabbed approach, implement clean scrollable sections:

Simple Approach:
- Back to single scrollable interface with all configuration sections
- No complex tab navigation or border rendering issues
- Straightforward ↑/↓ navigation between all fields
- Clean section organization without tab complexity

Benefits:
- ✅ Simple to use - no tab switching required
- ✅ All options visible with scrolling
- ✅ No navigation confusion between tabs and fields
- ✅ Easy to implement and maintain
- ✅ Standard list-style interface users expect

Ready to implement:
- Runtime section (container runtime selection)
- Credentials section (SSH, GitHub CLI, GPG, npm, AWS)
- Default Container section (image, update settings)
- Professional styling with fixed-width layout
- Save/Cancel buttons at bottom

This provides clean, professional configuration without the complexity
of tabs that were causing navigation issues.

🤖 Generated with Claude Code
